visual_description: A man in a light-colored, long-sleeved shirt and dark pants stands on a balcony at night, looking down. He leans against a black metal railing, his gaze fixed on something below. The balcony is enclosed by a translucent plastic sheet, which is illuminated from within, creating a bright, glowing effect. The background is dark, with the faint outlines of a building and some hanging lights visible. In the top left corner of the screen, there is a watermark with Chinese characters. The camera remains stationary, holding a medium shot of the man and his immediate surroundings. The audio is filled with a slow, melancholic instrumental piece. A gentle, somber melody, likely played on a string instrument, drifts through the air, creating a pensive and slightly sorrowful atmosphere. The music is atmospheric and contemplative, evoking a sense of quiet introspection or a moment of somber reflection. There are no spoken words or other sound effects, allowing the poignant melody to be the sole focus of the audio experience.
